remember: Students will be able to identify and locate different types of land use and land cover.
Students will be able to recall the factors influencing agriculture and types of farming.
Students will be able to remember the importance of land resources and their distribution.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of land degradation and its causes.
Students will be able to describe the relationship between land use and population growth.
Students will be able to understand the significance of sustainable agriculture.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of land use patterns to real-life situations.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of agricultural practices on the environment.
Students will be able to suggest ways to conserve and manage land resources effectively.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors affecting agricultural productivity and food security.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of government policies in promoting sustainable agriculture.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of farming practices.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the importance of land as a resource.
To analyze the factors influencing land use patterns and types of farming.
To explain the concept of land degradation and its consequences.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the ability to identify and describe different types of land use and land cover.
The board exam assesses the understanding of factors influencing agriculture and types of farming.
It evaluates the ability to analyze the impact of human activities on land resources and suggest sustainable solutions.
